title: Patient login routes to patient dashboard and renders analytics
description: Verifies a patient can log in, is routed to the patient dashboard, and sees analytics content rendered after the initial loading state.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Wait for the dashboard to finish initial loading
Click the quick action entry point for upcoming appointments
Verify the patient dashboard analytics (charts and stats) are displayed
Verify the upcoming appointments view is displayed

title: Doctor login routes to doctor dashboard and provides access to schedule/consultations
description: Verifies a doctor can log in, is routed to the doctor dashboard, and can access schedule or consultation items after analytics render.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Wait for the dashboard to finish initial loading
Click the entry point to view schedule or consultations
Verify the doctor dashboard analytics (charts and stats) are displayed
Verify schedule or consultation items are displayed

title: Clinic admin login routes to clinic dashboard and shows branch metrics
description: Verifies a clinic admin can log in, is routed to the clinic dashboard, and can view branch performance metrics after analytics render.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Wait for the dashboard to finish initial loading
Click the entry point to review branch performance metrics
Verify the clinic dashboard analytics (charts and stats) are displayed
Verify branch performance metrics are displayed

title: Medical store admin login routes to medical dashboard and shows inventory/registrations summary
description: Verifies a medical store admin can log in, is routed to the medical dashboard, and can view pending registrations or inventory summary after analytics render.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Wait for the dashboard to finish initial loading
Click the entry point to review pending registrations or inventory summary
Verify the medical dashboard analytics (charts and stats) are displayed
Verify inventory summary or pending registrations are displayed

title: Submit doctor onboarding application and see Pending status
description: Verifies a visitor can complete the full multi-step doctor onboarding flow including document uploads and sees a confirmation with Pending status after submission.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the header entry point to join as a doctor
Fill in the personal information fields with valid details
Proceed to the next step of the onboarding form
Fill in the credentials fields with valid license and specialization details
Proceed to the next step of the onboarding form
Fill in the practice details and availability with valid selections
Proceed to the document upload step
Upload a valid medical license document
Upload a valid government ID document
Submit the onboarding application
Verify a submission confirmation is displayed
Verify the application status is shown as pending review

title: Search blogs with keyword and category and read an article
description: Verifies a visitor can search by keyword, apply a category filter, open a result, and read the full blog article content.

steps.description: Navigate to /blogs
Fill a relevant keyword into the blog search field
Select a category filter pill
Click a blog post from the filtered results list
Verify the full blog article content is displayed
Verify the opened article corresponds to a result from the filtered list

title: Filter blogs by category only and read an article
description: Verifies a visitor can apply a category filter without a keyword, open a result, and read the full blog article content.

steps.description: Navigate to /blogs
Select a category filter pill
Click a blog post from the filtered results list
Verify the full blog article content is displayed
Verify the opened article is consistent with the selected category filter

title: Doctor onboarding required-field validation blocks submission
description: Verifies leaving a required field blank in doctor onboarding shows an inline validation error and prevents completing the submission.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the header entry point to join as a doctor
Fill in the personal information fields while leaving one required field empty
Proceed through the remaining steps by filling valid credentials and practice details
Upload a valid medical license document
Upload a valid government ID document
Attempt to submit the onboarding application
Verify a required-field validation error is visible
Verify the application is not submitted and the user remains in the onboarding flow
